programs.programName: Home Care for the Elderly (HCE) Program

verified.notes: HCE Program eligibility requires age 60+, income below ICP standard, and ICP asset limitation, but official .gov source does not specify the numeric asset or income thresholds. Phone number extracted from official Elder Affairs source (Elder Helpline 1-800-96-ELDER). Program is active as of 2026 and serves seniors in family-type living arrangements as alternative to institutional care.

programs.programName: Community Care for the Elderly (CCE) Program

verified.notes: CCE program eligibility requires age 60+ AND functional impairment (determined by comprehensive assessment). No income or asset limits found in official sources. Phone number is Elder Helpline (1-800-96-ELDER) provided by Florida Department of Elder Affairs for CCE inquiries.

programs.notes: CCE program eligibility requires age 60+ AND functional impairment (determined by comprehensive assessment). No income or asset limits found in official sources. Phone number is Elder Helpline (1-800-96-ELDER) provided by Florida Department of Elder Affairs for CCE inquiries.

verified.notes: Elder Options is an Area Agency on Aging (AAA) and Aging & Disability Resource Center (ADRC) that provides information, referrals, and counseling for seniors and caregivers in 16 North Central Florida counties. It is not itself a direct-benefit program with eligibility criteria (age, income, asset limits). Rather, it serves as a point of entry and counselor for multiple underlying programs (Medicaid, Medicare, CARES, in-home services, etc.), each with their own eligibility rules. The search results do not contain specific age, income, or asset thresholds for Elder Options itself. To obtain eligibility details, applicants must contact Elder Options or the Florida Department of Elder Affairs to discuss specific programs they may qualify for.

It is not itself a direct-benefit program with eligibility criteria (age, income, asset limits). The search results do not contain specific age, income, or asset thresholds for Elder Options itself.
